name: vestige-bridge
description: OpenClaw plugin bridge for Vestige recent memory recall and explicit stable export materialization.

scripts.health: node --input-type=module --eval "import('./src/index.js').then(async ({ createVestigeBridgeRuntime }) => { const runtime = createVestigeBridgeRuntime({ pluginConfig: {} }); const result = await runtime.health(); console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exitCode = 1; })"
